ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-13-2022 Continued To Sep-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Melbostad, via Zoom, for Scott Hrudicka, Executor.

Counsel reports regarding what is causing the delay in this matter and advises of filing a corrected inventory and appraisal and that he will likely a petition for final distribution and requests a continuance of sixty days.

The matter is continued to Sep-13-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-23-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 16, 2011, is admitted to probate. Scott D. Hrudicka is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for July 13, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.
